confirmation.detail: inbox envelope env_7fae8b6a-c46d-41c0-b236-43195c66eb0f read back as received

incident.observed_failure: Large output returned despite compact view; operator had to interrupt and call out token/context waste.

payload.operator_impact: The operator loses situational continuity and context budget during routine review-loop work, especially when there are many pending reviews.
requested_corrective_action: Add a bounded architect-loop command that returns only the highest-priority next obligation and a short reason, with an explicit output cap.
Make broad workboard JSON opt-in for exploratory use, not the default architect-loop probe.
Separate diagnostics/warnings from JSON result channels or summarize them into bounded fields.
Add regression coverage asserting compact architect-loop output stays under a strict line/byte budget.
Add a recurrence marker to CAPA handling when a previously reported ergonomics issue reappears after mitigation.
payload.source_context: User interrupted after a 566-line compact workboard response and asked why no CAPA was submitted despite prior CAPA work.
payload.summary: The architect loop again invoked `narada task workboard --view compact --format json` and received hundreds of lines of JSON plus stale-dist warning text. This is a recurrence of the previously identified compact-workboard/context-burn problem: the available compact view is still too verbose for routine obligation selection and does not provide a bounded next-action packet for architect review duties.
payload.title: Recurring CAPA: compact workboard still burns context in architect loop
why_prior_control_failed: The compact workboard remains a broad dashboard rather than a strict next-obligation packet.
The command still serializes large pending_reviews/source_envelopes structures.
The stale-governance warning is emitted into the same channel as machine-readable output, increasing noise.
There is no mechanical guard causing architect loop callers to use a bounded review/obligation command instead of broad workboard JSON.
